module.name: Uptimeify Monitoring
module.description: Sync your Plesk domains to uptimeify.io uptime and blacklist monitoring. Connect an organization API token, pick a customer and package per domain, and keep monitors in sync automatically or with one click. Two home-page widgets show health at a glance — one for this server, one for your whole account — and a white-label brand name lets the panel match your own hosting brand. Open-source API client for the uptimeify.io monitoring platform.
